# Intro

Welcome to the **yrPublish** documentation. This book gathers the project’s specs, setup instructions, and reference material in one place.
This documentation all lives in the docs folder of the yrPublish repo.
The documentation is maintained as a Quarto book. 
To render the documentation, naviate to the docs folder and run `quarto preview`.

**How to use this book**

- Start with <DOC-GUIDE-v001.qmd> to understand document types and version numbering.

***Below is the contents of the README.md that gets displayed on github.com***
Other files in this book have names that should clearly indicate what they contain.

---

{{< include ../README.md >}}
